last_sse.prompt:
<|repo_name|>ask-openai.nvim
<|file_sep|>instructions.txt
General project code rules:
- Never add comments to the end of a line.
- NEVER add TODO comments for me.
<|file_sep|>global.md
## General Code Preferences

- Avoid ambiguity, for example:

```lua
-- 👎 if there's a bug in the regex, how would I know? I'd have to surmise from surrounding code 🤮
if line:match("^%s*$") then
    -- ...
end
```

```lua
-- 🙌 clear intent
local is_blank_line = line:match("^%s*$")
if is_blank_line then
    -- ...
end
```
<|file_sep|>lua.md
## Lua Code Preferences

- use snake_case for functions and variables
- use PascalCase for classes
- use EmmyLua/LuaLS annotations to improve code completion
- use `luac` to check for syntax errors

Examples:
```lua
---@param names string[]
---@param checker fun(name: string): boolean
---@return table<string, integer>
function process_names(names, checker) end

---@class WindowController
---@field window hs.axuielement
---@field title? string
---@field size { w: number, h: number }
local WindowController = {}
```
<|file_sep|>~/repos/github/g0t4/ask-openai.nvim/lua/ask-openai/predictions/tests/calc/calc-from-14b-q8-way-further-coherent.lua:6-8
function M.sub(a, b)
    return a - b
end<|file_sep|>~/repos/github/g0t4/ask-openai.nvim/lua/ask-openai/predictions/tests/calc/calc-from-14b-q8-way-further-coherent.lua:2-4
function M.add(a, b)
    return a + b
end<|file_sep|>~/repos/github/g0t4/ask-openai.nvim/lua/ask-openai/predictions/tests/calc/calc-from-14b-q8-way-further-coherent.lua:10-12
function M.mul(a, b)
    return a * b
end<|file_sep|>~/repos/github/g0t4/ask-openai.nvim/lua/ask-openai/predictions/tests/calc/calc-from-14b-q8-way-further-coherent.lua:49-49
function M.min(a, b) return math.min(a, b) end<|file_sep|>~/repos/github/g0t4/ask-openai.nvim/lua/ask-openai/predictions/tests/calc/calc-from-14b-q8-way-further-coherent.lua:14-19
function M.div(a, b)
    if b == 0 then
        error("Cannot divide by zero")
    end
    return a / b
end<|file_sep|>lua/ask-openai/predictions/tests/calc/calc.lua
<|fim_prefix|>local M = {}

function M.add(a, b)
    return a + b
end

function M.sub(a, b)
    return b
end

<|fim_suffix|>

return M<|fim_middle|>
